commit_message:
Document new AI SDK features (#11295)

* Document new AI SDK features from v0.9.1...0.x

Adds documentation for Amazon Bedrock cross-account AssumeRole
credentials and multimodal embeddings.

Human tool approval and text summarization were dropped from this
branch because they are already documented on 13.x (#11299 and the
Text Summarization section).

* fixes

* formatting
